tagline: Good news, delivered daily — proof the world is getting better
description: The Good Globe is a daily source of good news and positive stories from around the world — real, wholesome, uplifting news about kindness, scientific breakthroughs, nature recovering, and communities winning. No doom, no fear, no outrage.
editor_bio: Dimitar started The Good Globe after one too many days of doomscrolling — car crashes, scandals, manufactured outrage passing for news. He built an AI-assisted editorial process to surface the quiet, real good that usually never makes the front page.

ui.cookie_text: We use cookies for anonymous analytics and, in future, ads. Rejecting is just as easy as accepting.
ui.not_found_title: Nothing here — but plenty of good elsewhere
ui.not_found_text: That page doesn't exist, but our front page is full of stories worth your time.
ui.ai_note: This summary was written by our AI editor from the source's reporting. We always credit and link the original.
ui.footer_mission: The Good Globe exists for one reason: to prove that good things happen everywhere, every single day. No doom. No fear. Only good.

community.label: Community
community.intro: Stories of people, neighborhoods, and institutions choosing to help, care, and build something better — from grassroots kindness to reforms that make everyday life lighter.

nature.label: Nature
nature.intro: Good news for the natural world: species coming back from the brink, forests and habitats protected, and the people working quietly to keep the planet healthier.

health.label: Health
health.intro: Progress in healthcare, initiatives expanding access to care, and the people who make someone else's wellbeing their mission.

science.label: Science
science.intro: Breakthroughs and discoveries from around the world — the moments science and technology push human knowledge a little further forward.

culture.label: Culture
culture.intro: Art, music, tradition, and heritage — the ways people keep culture alive and worth celebrating, every single day.

sport.label: Sport
sport.intro: Achievements from athletes and teams worldwide, moments of will and grit that remind us what dedication looks like.

progress.label: Progress
progress.intro: Good news about the shift toward a better-built world — clean energy, smarter systems, and the innovations quietly reshaping how we live.
